ddls:
CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "best_adapta" REAL /* The best adaptation score achieved in the iteration */,
  "jaccard_i" REAL /* Jaccard Index (I) value for the iteration */,
  "jaccard_p" REAL /* Jaccard Index (P) value for the iteration */,
  "sorensen_p" REAL /* Sorensen-Dice Coefficient value for the iteration */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Execution time for the iteration in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who created the iteration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration in which the hyperparameter was used */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value assigned to the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the lab */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project's objectives */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_iterations" (
  "project_iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a project and an iteration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_iterations_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_iterations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration that produced the model version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric for the model version */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric for the model version */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric for the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model deployment */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version being deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., staging, production) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployment_metrics" (
  "deployment_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment metric */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deployment associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_metrics_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES model_deployments ("deployment_id")
)
